features.title: Define Markdown-to-PDF web app design
features.user_visible_behavior: The project has an approved implementation design for a web app that lets users edit Markdown, preview the document, adjust PDF styles, and export a PDF.
verification: Review the proposed web app workflow.
Review the editor, preview, style controls, and export behavior.
Review supported Markdown features and non-goals.
Confirm that the user approves the design.
evidence: 2026-07-02: Draft design written at docs/markdown-to-pdf-cli-design.md.
2026-07-02: User decided to change direction from CLI to web app.
2026-07-02: User selected Next.js, TypeScript, and Playwright as the project stack.
2026-07-02: Draft design written at docs/markdown-to-pdf-web-app-design.md.
2026-07-02: User approved writing the implementation plan.
2026-07-02: Implementation plan written at docs/markdown-to-pdf-web-app-implementation-plan.md.
2026-07-02: Web app design marked approved in docs/markdown-to-pdf-web-app-design.md.
features.notes: CLI direction was superseded. Web app design was approved for implementation planning.

features.title: Convert Markdown to HTML
features.user_visible_behavior: Markdown headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and links are represented correctly in generated HTML.
verification: Convert a sample Markdown file.
Inspect generated HTML structure or snapshot.
Run parser-focused automated tests.

features.title: Show live document preview
features.user_visible_behavior: As the user edits Markdown, the preview pane updates to show the rendered document with current style settings.
verification: Type Markdown in the editor.
Confirm headings, lists, tables, code blocks, links, images, and Korean text render in the preview.
Change style controls and confirm the preview updates.
evidence: 2026-07-02: Added MarkdownEditor, PreviewPane, app shell layout, and shared DocumentRenderer preview.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/editor-preview.spec.ts passed.
features.notes: Preview rendering should share the same document CSS used for PDF export.

features.title: Adjust PDF-oriented styles before export
features.user_visible_behavior: The user can change font size, line height, page margin, page size, and code block styling before generating the PDF.
verification: Change font size and confirm preview text updates.
Change line height and confirm preview spacing updates.
Change margin or page size and confirm page layout updates.
evidence: 2026-07-02: Added StylePanel with body font size, line height, page size, margin, and code font size controls.
2026-07-02: E2E verified body font size and line height update preview CSS.
features.notes: This replaces post-generation PDF editing for layout changes.

features.title: Export preview layout to PDF
features.user_visible_behavior: Clicking export downloads a PDF that matches the preview layout closely.
verification: Enter a sample Markdown document in the web app.
Apply non-default style settings.
Export the document to PDF.
Confirm the PDF exists and has at least one page.
Confirm Korean text and code block styling are readable.
evidence: 2026-07-02: PDF export is the next active implementation task after editor, preview, and style controls passed.
2026-07-02: Failing PDF export E2E test added at tests/e2e/pdf-export.spec.ts.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/pdf-export.spec.ts failed because Export PDF button does not exist yet.
2026-07-02: AGENTS.md verified and updated to explicitly require automatic harness updates during sessions.
2026-07-02: Added export page, PDF API route, Playwright PDF helper, and Export PDF button.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/pdf-export.spec.ts passed and verified generated PDF has at least one page.
features.notes: Playwright/Chromium export is implemented for the MVP.

features.title: Upload image assets for Markdown preview and export
features.user_visible_behavior: The user can upload local image files and reference them from Markdown by filename.
verification: Upload a local image file.
Reference the uploaded filename from Markdown.
Confirm the image appears in the preview.
Export PDF and confirm the image remains visible.
evidence: 2026-07-02: Image asset UI is the next active implementation task after PDF export passed.
2026-07-02: Failing image upload E2E test added to tests/e2e/editor-preview.spec.ts.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/editor-preview.spec.ts failed because Image uploads UI did not exist.
2026-07-02: Added ImageAssetPanel and connected uploaded assets to DocumentState.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/editor-preview.spec.ts passed with 2 tests.
2026-07-02: Added PDF export E2E coverage for documents referencing uploaded images.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/pdf-export.spec.ts passed with 2 tests.
features.notes: Uploaded files are stored as data URLs in browser state for the MVP.

features.title: Provide clear web UI errors
features.user_visible_behavior: Invalid Markdown input, unsupported assets, and export failures produce clear messages in the web UI.
verification: Trigger an export failure.
Add an unsupported or missing image reference.
Confirm the UI shows actionable messages.
evidence: 2026-07-02: Error handling review is the next active implementation task before final verification.
2026-07-02: Failing error handling E2E test added at tests/e2e/error-handling.spec.ts.
2026-07-02: Missing image message already passed via role=note.
2026-07-02: Invalid export initially exposed raw Zod error JSON.
2026-07-02: Export API now maps validation errors to user-facing messages.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/error-handling.spec.ts passed with 2 tests.
features.notes: Error style will follow the selected web app design.

features.title: Preserve editor line breaks and show page boundaries
features.user_visible_behavior: The preview and PDF export preserve Enter-based spacing intuitively, and the preview shows page boundary guides so users can inspect pagination before export.
verification: Enter one or more line breaks in Markdown and confirm the preview preserves visible spacing.

Use
and two-space hard breaks and confirm they render as line breaks.
Add enough content to exceed one PDF page and confirm the preview shows page break guides.
Run lint, unit tests, E2E tests, and build.
evidence: 2026-07-02: User requested Enter-count-based spacing and page boundary visibility in PDF preview.
2026-07-02: Added failing unit tests for Enter preservation, repeated blank lines, br tag normalization, fenced code preservation, and table preservation.
2026-07-02: Added failing renderer/E2E tests for visible line breaks and page boundary guides.
2026-07-02: Added regression coverage for repeated blank lines between a paragraph and the next heading, matching the user's reported sample.
2026-07-02: Added regression coverage for blank lines before all ATX heading levels, including `### 코드` and `#### **현재 구현된 코드**`.
2026-07-02: Added regression coverage for visible spacing above and below tables while keeping tables parsed as tables.
2026-07-02: Added regression coverage for visible spacing between a list item and the next heading, matching the reported endpoint deprecation sample.
2026-07-02: Added preserveMarkdownLineBreaks renderer preprocessing outside fenced code, tables, and structural block lines.
2026-07-02: Added PDF page boundary guide overlay to preview and hid it in print/PDF export.
2026-07-02: npm run lint passed.
2026-07-02: npm run test passed with 4 test files and 33 tests.
2026-07-02: npm run test:e2e passed with 7 tests.
2026-07-02: npm run build passed.
features.notes: Preview and export share DocumentRenderer, so line break behavior is consistent. Page guide overlay is screen-only and hidden in print.
